Table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_BUSINESS_SME

Card of table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_BUSINESS_SME

Name

FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_BUSINESS_SME

Code

FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_BUSINESS_SME

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_BUSINESS_SME

No RLS as this table is a dictionary

Historization: SCD1

Load type: DELTA

 

VALID_FROM - 1900-01-01 00:00:00

 

select

MD5(ATLAN_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GUID_BK+VALID_FROM),

md5(OWNERSHIP_METADATA_BUSINESS_SME_BK+VALID_FROM)

 

 

(

SELECT DISTINCT

GUID as ATLAN_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GUID_BK,

OWNERSHIP_METADATA_BUSINESS_SME_BK FROM (

SELECT DISTINCT

 

GUID ,

 

TRIM(SPLIT.VALUE) AS OWNERSHIP_METADATA_BUSINESS_SME_BK

 

FROM (

 

SELECT

 

GUID,

 

REPLACE(OWNERSHIP_METADATA_BUSINESS_SME, '\n', ',') AS OWNERSHIP_METADATA_BUSINESS_SME_REPLACED

 

FROM (

 

SELECT DISTINCT GUID, OWNERSHIP_METADATA_BUSINESS_SME

 

FROM T_ATLAN_EXPORT_PHYSICAL_ASSETS

 

 

WHERE OWNERSHIP_METADATA_BUSINESS_SME IS NOT NULL

 

)

 

) AS BASE,

 

LATERAL SPLIT_TO_TABLE(BASE.OWNERSHIP_METADATA_BUSINESS_SME_REPLACED, ',') AS SPLIT

 

WHERE TRIM(SPLIT.VALUE) != ''

 

ORDER BY GUID, OWNERSHIP_METADATA_BUSINESS_SME_BK

)

))


Check constraint name of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_BUSINESS_SME

CKT_FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERS


Server validation rule of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_BUSINESS_SME

%RULES%


Code preview of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_BUSINESS_SME

drop table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_BUSINESS_SME cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_BUSINESS_SME
--==============================================================
create or replace table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_BUSINESS_SME (
DIM_PHYSICAL_ASSET_KEY VARCHAR(32) not null,
DIM_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_KEY VARCHAR(32) not null,
constraint PK_FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSH primary key (DIM_PHYSICAL_ASSET_KEY, DIM_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_KEY)
not enforced
);

alter table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_BUSINESS_SME set comment = 'Table having list of OWNERSHIP_METADATA_BUSINESS_SME Keys of physical asset ';

comment on column FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_BUSINESS_SME.DIM_PHYSICAL_ASSET_KEY is
'Dimension Key';

comment on column FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_BUSINESS_SME.DIM_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_KEY is
'dimensional Key adding unique identifier';
